name: Pita Pizza Bites
recipeIngredient: 4 oz Mushroom stems and pieces, drained (1 can)
1 cup Finely shredded Mozzarella cheese (4 ounces)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 425°F.
2. Split each pita bread into half around the edge, creating 4 rounds.
3. Place the rounds cut-sides up on an ungreased cookie sheet.
4. Arrange mushrooms on the bread rounds.
5. Add onion and bell pepper pieces.
6. Sprinkle with basil and cheeses.
7. Bake for 8 to 10 minutes, or until cheese is melted.
8. Cut each round into 8 pieces.
Makes 32 appetizers. Preparation time: 10 minutes Baking time: 8 to 10 minutes
